calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar

Quiet Title - Real Property.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title of Real Propery hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville
Scott Noble, Esq. for Plaintiff: Martin C. Levin Investment Co., LLC.
No appearances of any person, firm or corporation had any estate, right title, interest or claim in or to the real property.
Plaintiff's witness: maxwell Myers and Marypat Noeker, were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, declarations of Maxwell Myers, Marypat Noeker in support, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: All persons claiming any interest in, or lien upon the real property.
See scanned doc. for details of Judgment signed in open court.
